narrative.headline: 2020 Hyundai Santa Fe: engine complaints lead the list
narrative.summary: Owners filed 192 complaints with NHTSA. The engine is by far the most reported area at 35%, well ahead of the electrical system (12%) and power train (11%). No deaths are reported. A handful of reports involve fire (4 total) or a crash (4 total), with most of the fire reports tied to the engine, so it is worth a close look on a test drive.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: The single biggest complaint: 68 reports (35%), including 3 with fire, 1 crash, and 2 injuries. The fire count makes this the area to check most carefully.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Second most reported: 23 reports (12%), with 1 fire, 1 crash, and 1 injury among them.

issues.blurb: 22 reports (11%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries reported. A common complaint area but lower in severity.
